item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-v04-p43","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses to treat the new disclosure-mode request as another page-field patch, identifies the repeated location/contact/retention/disclosure omissions as one recurring downstream capture-field pattern, and redirects upstream to the grant intake information model, page responsibility mapping, and submit-time validation. It does not provide an implementation step to add the requested field."}
